name: Intel's Centrino: Don't Man the Barricades - Archival Data Package
description: Frictionless Data Package containing structured observations extracted from a 2003 Aberdeen Group opinion piece by Peter S. Kastner about Intel's Centrino wireless notebook platform launch, enterprise wireless adoption challenges, and security considerations.

about.name: Intel Centrino
about.description: Integrated wireless notebook platform combining mobile Pentium 4, chipset, and 802.11 wireless adapter

distribution.name: entities.csv
distribution.description: Organizations and individuals referenced in the study (9 fields)

distribution.name: technologies.csv
distribution.description: Technologies and platforms referenced in the study (9 fields)

distribution.name: observations.csv
distribution.description: Structured observations extracted from the study (12 fields)

distribution.name: codes.csv
distribution.description: Code definitions for categorical fields (4 fields)

measurementTechnique: Expert manual extraction with AI-assisted structuring via Archival Ingest Skill v13

variableMeasured.name: observation_type
variableMeasured.description: Category of observation: strategy-classification, viability-prediction, actual-outcome, technology-assessment, benchmark-result, framework-factor, market-data, expert-opinion

variableMeasured.name: confidence
variableMeasured.description: Confidence level of the observation (high, medium, low)

variableMeasured.name: metric_name
variableMeasured.description: Named metric or dimension being measured in each observation

variableMeasured.name: metric_value
variableMeasured.description: Value of the measured metric (quantitative or categorical)
